function.name: subtract_days
function.description: Subtract N days from a given date.
function.long_description: Parses an input date and returns the resulting date after subtracting a specified number of days.
example_user_queries: Calculate a new date by removing 90 days from 2023-06-01.
what is the date 45 days before 2024-01-15?
Call subtract_days with date 15/03/2026, n 10, date_format %d/%m/%Y.
by using subtract_days, find the date 100 days before 2025-05-20.
Get the resulting date after subtracting 3 days from 2026-07-04.
Determine the date that is 60 days before 2024-12-31.
If I subtract 365 days from 2021-03-01, what is the result?
Return the date that is 15 days before 2023-12-31.
